SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.model

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.model.Event
public class Event extends Object
Domain model for a Helios event.

Used across entrant browsing, organizer event management, QR generation, and lottery/draw state. Invariants such as positive capacity and valid date ordering are enforced by service-layer validation, not by this model.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String title, String description, String locationName, String address, long startTimeMillis, long endTimeMillis, long registrationOpensMillis, long registrationClosesMillis, int capacity, int sampleSize, Integer waitlistLimit, boolean geolocationRequired, String lotteryGuidelines, String organizerUid, String posterImageId, String qrCodeValue, List<String> interests, int drawCount, boolean privateEvent)
      Constructs a new Event with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      eventId - Unique identifier for the event.
      title - Title of the event.
      description - Detailed description of the event.
      locationName - Name of the location.
      address - Physical address of the event.
      startTimeMillis - Start time in epoch milliseconds.
      endTimeMillis - End time in epoch milliseconds.
      registrationOpensMillis - Time when registration starts.
      registrationClosesMillis - Time when registration ends.
      capacity - Maximum number of attendees.
      sampleSize - Number of people to be selected in the lottery.
      waitlistLimit - Optional limit for the waiting list.
      geolocationRequired - Whether geolocation is required for entrants.
      lotteryGuidelines - Guidelines for the lottery process.
      organizerUid - UID of the user who organized the event.
      posterImageId - ID of the poster image (optional).
      qrCodeValue - Value encoded in the QR code (optional).
      interests - List of interests associated with the event.
      drawCount - Number of completed draws for this event.
      privateEvent - Whether the event is private.
